title: Convection Moves Heat
script_summary: Exploring how convection drives heat movement in nature and everyday life.

segments.voiceover: Warm fluid rises, cool fluid sinks—what's really happening?
This is convection, one of nature's most powerful forces.
Think boiling water. The heat causes water at the bottom to rise, while cooler water descends.
Weather patterns? Same principle! Warm air rises, creating clouds, while cool air sinks.
Convection isn't just science; it's life around us in action.
Want to dive deeper into the mysteries of physics? Follow for more!
